Careers
Onward is a non-profit organization committed to housing people affordably. Our work is compelling and rewarding. Join our team!
About Onward
Onward offers a career that is meaningful

As one of the largest and fastest-growing not-for-profit affordable housing providers in the city, we house more than 3,000 people in our more than 30 buildings. 

As a member of our Onward team, you are making a very real and tangible difference in the lives of individuals - vulnerable people with limited resources to help themselves. We welcome individuals, families, seniors, Indigenous persons, newcomers to Canada, and others. We work with more than 60 social service agencies who refer and support our residents. To do this well takes an exceptional team of employees who value positive results, show leadership, and believe in the non-judgmental inclusion of others.

If this sounds like you, we invite you to consider joining us. We are always looking for great talent, please submit your resume or expression of interest to: joinus@onwardhomes.ca

Building services

The Building Services team at Onward plays a crucial role in ensuring the optimal functioning and upkeep of our properties.
